narrative: Added an example LangGraph script and npm command to demonstrate typed-state workflows with streaming output. Updated WODE.md with instructions so users can experiment with LangGraph 0.4 in this fork.
user_input: scaffold anything that this goal could need, be innovators and surprise me
scene_before: WODE only offered simple wrappers around olca and coaiapy with no LangGraph showcase.
scene_after: Developers can now run an example LangGraph script via npm to see how typed-state graphs orchestrate model calls, inspiring deeper integration.
